category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Kertish Object Storage and cluster administration CLI; official README describes distributed object storage.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Kertish-DOS; source_facts.name provides kertish-dos package identity.
docs_sources: Official repository README includes introduction, architecture, terminology, features, system requirements, and installation guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/freakmaxi/kertish-dos, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists krtadm and krtfs; official README describes distributed object storage, clusters, manager/head/data nodes, and command-line admin/file-storage tools.
